Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Deft John Bertoldi'S Further Responses To Req.'S For Production Set One
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Megan Jeanne of The Corporation Law Group (650-227-8000) appear for plaintiff RT Western Maintenance Inc. moving party. / Atty. Gregory R. Shaughnessy (415-435-2409) appear for defendant John Bertoldi Incorporated, opposing party.

Argued, the court rules PLAINTIFF RT WESTERN MAINTENANCE INC.'s Motion To Compel Defendant John Bertoldi'S Further Responses To Request For Production Set One is granted. Copies of any document related to work done on the property by responding party since the time of the bid. The request seeks information clearly relevant to the issues in the litigation and the objections to it are without merit. Defendant John Bertoldi shouls serve full and complete responses, without objection within 15 days from the date of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
